name: pr-reviewer
description: Review pull requests with GitHub Copilot, narrated by an animated cartoon character in the style of Ricky Gervais.

commands.title: PR Reviewer: Review Current PR / Branch Diff
PR Reviewer: Clear All Review Decorations

prReviewer.reviewerStyle.description: The persona / reviewer style used when prompting Copilot. Default is 'Ricky Gervais'. You can set this to any style you like, e.g. 'Gordon Ramsay', 'a disappointed professor', etc.

prReviewer.extraInstructions.description: Additional instructions appended to the review prompt, e.g. 'Focus on security issues only'.

prReviewer.baseBranch.description: The base branch to diff against when no upstream PR is detected (e.g. 'main' or 'develop').

prReviewer.spritesheetPath.description: Absolute path to a custom PNG sprite sheet for the reviewer character. Leave empty to use the built-in placeholder.

prReviewer.spriteFrameWidth.description: Width (px) of a single frame in the sprite sheet.

prReviewer.spriteFrameHeight.description: Height (px) of a single frame in the sprite sheet.

prReviewer.spriteFrameCount.description: Total number of animation frames in the sprite sheet (laid out horizontally).

prReviewer.model.description: The Copilot language model to use. Must be a model ID accessible through the VS Code Language Model API (e.g. 'copilot-gpt-4o', 'copilot-gpt-4').
